art_style: Cinematic photorealistic motorsport film look, golden afternoon sunlight, dynamic motion blur, high-contrast teal-and-orange color grade, shallow depth of field, intense and energetic mood, vertical 9:16 framing.

characters.name: İhsan
characters.bio: Kararlı, yetenekli genç yarış pilotu — hikâyenin kahramanı.
characters.appearance: The exact same man as in the reference image — identical face, identity and features must be preserved. Young man wearing a red and black racing suit with racing gloves, confident and determined expression.

characters.name: Rakip
characters.appearance: A cocky rival race driver in his late 20s, sharp jawline, smug confident grin, slicked-back dark hair, wearing a sleek black and yellow racing suit.

environments.name: Yarış pisti
environments.desc: A professional outdoor asphalt race circuit on a sunny afternoon, painted starting-grid lines, grandstands with a blurred cheering crowd, blue sky with distant hills.

props.name: İhsan'ın arabası
props.desc: A sleek red and black open-wheel formula-style race car with the number 7.

props.name: Rakip'in arabası
props.desc: An aggressive black and yellow open-wheel formula-style race car with the number 13.
